$metadata.author: Usman Hussain
$metadata.scope: Stage 0 Waves 2-5 FFET Gate 3 readiness package. Planning/control artifact only; no execution approval implied.

ffets.name: Final legacy-name and active-status audit
ffets.maximum_concrete_capability_within_scope: Execute the full concrete wave capability authorized by this FFET, not a placeholder or metadata-only substitute, while staying inside the exact listed files.
ffets.control_or_runtime_mcr: Final scan proves zero unclassified active legacy hits, all allowed legacy hits have line-level justification, and any remaining AKTI terms are historical/external or explicitly approved transition exceptions.
validation_commands: custom scope audit: changed files exactly match FFET files_expected_to_change
custom legacy-name audit: every surviving active legacy hit has registry classification or sunset condition
stop_conditions: business, schema, API, permission, ADL, public legal, or product decision not present in ratified source truth
runtime/code/package/schema/generated/script/frontend/AGENTS change not explicitly owned by this FFET
validation failure after 3 bounded self-heal attempts
CI failure outside active FFET scope
merge conflict not resolvable inside exact listed files
ffets.rollback_notes: Revert the FFET commit/PR. If file moves are executed in a later Wave 2 or Wave 4 PR, rollback must restore both original paths and all updated references from the same exact file set.
expected_evidence: PR URL and merge commit after future execution approval
